## Documentation-as-code

- [ ] Updated the matching development docs, or this change has no documentation impact.
- [ ] If behavior or progress changed, updated `docs/dev/progress.md`.
- [ ] If architecture, module ownership, or data flow changed, updated `docs/dev/project-map.md`.
- [ ] If a durable decision changed, updated `docs/dev/decisions.md`.
- [ ] If commands, CI, GitHub, Vercel, or release flow changed, updated `docs/dev/workflow.md`.
- [ ] If app structure or app-level rules changed, updated `app/AGENTS.md`.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Targeted check: 
- [ ] Not run, reason:
